2026-02-26JUSYukon ActOrder Appointing the Hon. Nancy L. Backhouse, to be deputy judge of the Supreme Court of YukonOrder appointing the Honourable Nancy L. Backhouse, former judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Supreme Court of Yukon.N/A
subject: Order Appointing the Hon. Nancy L. Backhouse, to be deputy judge of the Supreme Court of Yukon
precis: Order appointing the Honourable Nancy L. Backhouse, former judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Supreme Court of Yukon.
